questionHtml: A single pulse of light enters an optic fibre which contains small impurities that scatter the light. Explain the effect of these impurities on the pulse.
markschemeHtml:
mention of attenuation ✓

mention of dispersion or pulse broadening ✓

gives explanation for at least one of above ✓

meta.title: A single pulse of light enters an optic fibre which contains small impurities that scatter the light. Explain the effect of these impurities on the pulse.
